summary: A Fox News segment that opens on a statistics graphic tallying vehicle attacks against CBP/ICE (71 vs CBP, 28 vs ICE, with year-over-year percentage increases) and then cuts to a LIVE interview with ICE Director Todd Lyons alongside inset footage of a Broadview, IL clash. It is a cable-news clip with a stats graphic, not produced entertainment or music-driven, so out of scope.
notable_text: VEHICLE ATTACKS AGAINST CBP/ICE; 71 VEHICULAR ATTACKS AGAINST CBP... 58% INCREASE; 28... 1,300% INCREASE; FOX NEWS; RPT: I.C.E. AGENTS FACE 1000% SPIKE IN ASSAULTS; Todd Lyons, I.C.E. Director
